title: FDA Approves New Alzheimer's Drug Showing Significant Cognitive Improvement
summary: The FDA has granted accelerated approval to a novel monoclonal antibody that demonstrated a 35% reduction in cognitive decline in Phase 3 clinical trials among early Alzheimer's patients.

title: WHO Updates Essential Medicines List: 20 New Drugs Added for 2025
summary: The World Health Organization has expanded its Model Essential Medicines List to include treatments for tuberculosis, cancer, and rare diseases, improving access to critical medications globally.

title: Metformin Demonstrates Anti-Aging Properties in Groundbreaking Study
summary: Researchers at Stanford University have published evidence suggesting metformin may extend healthspan by activating AMPK pathways, sparking interest in geroscience and longevity research.

title: GLP-1 Receptor Agonists Reshape Obesity Treatment Landscape in 2025
summary: Semaglutide and tirzepatide continue to dominate obesity pharmacotherapy, with new long-acting formulations offering once-monthly dosing now entering Phase 3 trials.

title: Antibiotic Resistance: New Phage Therapy Shows Promise Against Drug-Resistant Bacteria
summary: A clinical trial published in The Lancet demonstrates that bacteriophage therapy achieves 78% success rate against carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae (CRE), offering new hope in the AMR crisis.

title: Digital Pharmacies Surge: Tele-Pharmacy Services Expand Access to Rural Areas
summary: A new report highlights 200% growth in tele-pharmacy adoption across South Asia and Africa, dramatically improving medication adherence and reducing prescription errors in underserved communities.
